title: F1 2025 Monza Special Livery Boat
description: This is a Formula 1 2025 texturepack by AdamixGaming, Jerpix and NotGatoz | required OPTIFINE!!!
body:
If you want to appreciate our work, you will find links to our buycoffees in the "License" file in the texturepack.


Mercedes Safety Car
  
    All boat with chest (without bamboo raft)

Aston Martin Safety Car

    Bamboo Chest Raft
  
No command is needed to spawn the Safety Car
